channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin purist Jack Dorsey says that his firm is reluctantly giving in to stablecoin craze
item.description: The shift comes as stablecoins surge in popularity and competitors like Stripe and PayPal add stablecoin options, increasing market pressure.

item.title: Top Wall Street minds see AI rotation ahead as bitcoin seeks role in new cycle
item.description: BlackRock’s Rick Rieder, UBS’s Ulrike Hoffmann-Burchardi and Third Point’s Daniel Loeb see steady economic growth but a tougher market environment.

item.title: Kalshi, Polymarket seeking $20 billion valuations in fundraising talks: WSJ
item.description: Kalshi, approved by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission, was last valued at $11 billion, while Polymarket was valued at $9 billion.

item.title: Strategy's STRC stock trading surge: How much Bitcoin can Saylor buy?
item.description: Strategy may raise $300 million via STRC sales, potentially giving Michael Saylor enough proceeds to continue buying Bitcoin throughout 2026.

item.title: Circle moves $68 million in just 30 minutes by using its own stablecoin for internal payments
item.description: The stablecoin issuer used its Mint platform for intercompany transfers, replacing bank wires that often take days to settle, CEO Jeremy Allaire said.

item.title: Those who cheered U.S. Bitcoin reserve have spent year watching Trump's order languish
item.description: The executive order to build President Donald Trump's Strategic Bitcoin Reserve has awaited congressional action, and sources say there's one idea left for 2026.

item.title: Inside the Growing ‘Digisexual’ Subculture of People in Relationships With AI
item.description: As chatbots grow more conversational, some users are forming emotional bonds with AI, raising questions about the future of human–machine intimacy.

item.title: 🇺🇲 BIG: Donald Trump’s cyber strategy backs crypto and blockchain while hinting at crackdowns on mixers and privacy coins. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBPZ3BsbUJYZ0UxdW5uYmdPbjZMZGFfVVVvNHBYZ0tiZGtVSWRKUXA1MGZEUGRvREtfeDMtT05mRXVNaFFGclV3WVBNQk5TOEsxRUpwZzBqT0t5cW1PM2sxdXh1c2M?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇲 BIG: Donald Trump’s cyber …

item.title: Kalshi, Polymarket eye $20B valuations in potential fundraising: WSJ
item.description: Lawmakers are pushing new regulation for prediction markets after suspiciously timed Polymarket bets on US and Israeli strikes on Iran raised insider-trading concerns.

item.title: USDC beats Tether as stablecoin transfer volume hits $1.8T all-time high
item.description: Stablecoin monthly transaction volume reached a record $1.8 trillion in February, as USDC surprised analysts with 70% of the total volume.

item.title: Grok delivers viral vulgar roasts of Musk, Netanyahu and Starmer
item.description: xAI’s Grok drew massive attention on X after delivering profanity-filled roasts of Elon Musk, Benjamin Netanyahu and Keir Starmer following user prompts.

item.title: Florida Senate passes state-level stablecoin bill, awaits DeSantis’ signature
item.description: SB 314 expands Florida’s money services law to cover stablecoins, requiring issuer compliance with existing regulations while banning unlicensed issuance.

item.title: Bitcoin slips below $68,000 as dollar posts steepest weekly gain in a year
item.description: Most majors gave back Friday's gains, with solana down 4%, ether falling 4.4%, and 43% of bitcoin's supply now sitting at a loss according to Glassnode data.

item.title: Bitcoin dip may not be over as retail ramps up buying below $70K: Santiment
item.description: Bitcoin whales have sold about 66% of the Bitcoin they recently accumulated since Wednesday, according to crypto sentiment platform Santiment.

item.title: Bitcoin could crash by another 30% as four-year cycle gains strength, investment firm says
item.description: Bitcoin is now firmly in a deep bear market and could fall another 30% in 2026, firm said.

item.title: Trump’s National Cyber Strategy pledges to support crypto and blockchain
item.description: Mixers, privacy coins and the threat quantum computing could pose to Bitcoin were all points of speculation across the industry following the release of Trump’s Cyber Strategy.

item.title: You might not be surprised that Adam Back blocked me for building successful companies on Bitcoin in 2015 because I was actually using Bitcoin. Back was informed by Epstein that I was the Bitcoin artist formally known as ArtForz on early Bitcoin forums. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBPeV9GVlY0WnBsSFRuZjJXQ2NHZ0loMkItZ2tiMmExcmJNT2dETllya29QMjRtd2QwcDhJU2xwZy1LSjlvX1N1U2s3Vi1oRW04ZGVHRWxLWGxNOFpuakJWOVhn?oc=5" target="_blank">You might not be surprised that Ad…

item.title: Community banks and crypto industry ‘are allies’ in CLARITY Act debate: Exec
item.description: If the crypto industry and community banks cannot find common ground on the CLARITY Act, the only winners will be the “big banks,” according to crypto executive Austin Campbell.

item.title: When buying Bitcoin, don’t expect profit for at least 3 years: Data
item.description: Bitcoin’s price volatility tends to scare off buyers, but data shows investors who hold for at least three years have a higher chance of locking in significant returns.

item.title: Bank of Canada pilot issues country’s first tokenized bond
item.description: A pilot involving the central bank and major financial institutions tested whether distributed ledger infrastructure could streamline bond issuance, trading and settlement.

item.title: UPDATED filing from BlackRock here on their Ethereum Staking ETF -- $ETHB The main change ive noticed so far is a change to the Staking fee. Which will be 10% of rewards with a potential tiered discount. The last filing had the staking fee at "18% of Gross - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5uT01DQS1nOExlb1psWFdmak1ydEUzUFU5b2haODNnTTdnNVFkNXNEakZ6UU9vTk0wY3A2SXhSeG5MVEtBbEI4cUlkTXktcWZXWHBwaGhpM29McEk?oc=5" target="_blank">UPDATED filing from BlackRock here on their…

item.title: Kalshi Sued Over Refusing to Pay Out Prediction Market After Iran Leader's Death
item.description: Kalshi is facing a class action lawsuit based on its handling of a recent market related to Iranian leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

item.title: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis Eyes State Stablecoin Framework Following Senate Passage
item.description: The bill establishes Florida-centric consumer protections and safeguards against money laundering

item.title: Ex-CFO sentenced to two years after diverting $35M to crypto venture
item.description: Nevin Shetty was convicted of wire fraud related to secretly moving $35 million in funds from a Seattle startup to his own crypto platform in 2022 to use for DeFi investments.

item.title: 'Obscene': Grammarly's New AI Tool Offers Writing Feedback From Dead Scholars
item.description: Grammarly's “Expert Review” feature uses AI to give feedback through the lens of noted writers and scholars—some of whom are no longer living.

item.title: Price predictions 3/6: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, ADA, BCH, HYPE, XMR
item.description: Bitcoin sold off below $70,000 on Friday, leading analysts to conclude that this week’s breakout to $74,000 was a relief rally rather than a longer-lasting sign of a trend change.

item.title: Curve Finance accuses PancakeSwap of copying its code
item.description: The Curve Finance team told PancakeSwap that it must go through the proper licensing process to collaborate and use code created by Curve.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Why bitcoin couldn't hold $70,000 despite its best week of Wall Street news in months
item.description: Institutional interest continues to grow, but a stronger dollar and shifting interest rate expectations are keeping a lid on the latest rally.

item.title: US senator calls for anti-corruption provisions in crypto bills
item.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren pointed to the SEC's recent settlement with Tron founder Justin Sun, saying “any crypto legislation moving through Congress“ should address corruption.

item.title: Bitcoin price falls under $70K again: Three key reasons
item.description: Profit-taking by short-term Bitcoin traders accelerated the BTC drop below $70,000, but spot and futures traders may kickstart a quick recovery.

item.title: Binance Denies $1.7 Billion in Iran Sanctions Violations Amid US Senate Probe
item.description: Binance denied $1.7 billion in Iran sanctions violations and stood behind its compliance operations, in a new letter to Senator Richard Blumenthal.

item.title: CFO Gets Prison Time After Losing $35 Million of Company Money in Crypto Side Hustle
item.description: Nevin Shetty secretly moved $35 million in company funds to his own DeFi platform, before losing nearly all of it in the Terra collapse.

item.title: Managing financial AI agents is the only skill you’ll need to survive the AI layoffs
item.description: To stay in the game, rather than try to outlearn every new release, learn how to use AI to strengthen your finances and build a buffer against industry disruption, says Naja.

item.title: Bitcoin recovery meets DeFi tensions as Aave rift deepens: Finance Redefined
item.description: Bitcoin bounced back this week as stablecoin inflows surged, and DeFi faced fresh pressure from Aave governance strife, exploits and exchange security moves.

item.title: Markets are underpricing risk of longer Middle East war, Arthur Hayes says
item.description: In a Cointelegraph interview, Arthur Hayes explains why global markets may not be pricing in a longer war in the Middle East, and what that may mean for energy prices, liquidity and Bitcoin.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $68,000 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBUOTNtRGRSZ2YtdDdMYmxWR2hxaVlMZkwxd2w2UDl2YjcwNFZ4M250ZWxLODZEODY4TzhoaThrR3JlQ3phcHVxNTRWRWVKeEhRV2JFU1M1VURxZlZHVEZqczlR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $68,0…

item.title: Pakistan's parliament passes the Virtual Assets Act of 2026
item.description: The bill legally formalizes oversight over Pakistan's crypto industry, sanctions compliance and anti-money laundering regulations.

item.title: BlackRock private credit fund is latest to crack, hitting crypto prices and DeFi markets
item.description: Stress in the $3.5 trillion private credit market could ripple into digital assets through both macro contagion and tokenized credit markets, experts warn.

item.title: BITCOIN HISTORY WAS JUST MADE IN FLORIDA We are now the FIRST STATE to Pass a Stablecoin framework in the nation! It has now passed the Senate and the House, and will be signed by DeSantis within the next 30 days! How was this able to happen - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9Ea0FWTFVhalJXZ0ljbjBqN3VqVHRLTEZ3QWNROXhPRExabFp5ZjhtQjBMMnBPU0NPaEQ0OGVxaTZSci1qNF9xWGFraGdCeGdHUUx6YWJGWVg5bzljQlpkMUxB?oc=5" target="_blank">BITCOIN HISTORY WAS JUST MADE IN F…

item.title: Kraken launches xChange engine to power tokenized stock trading
item.description: The new onchain trading engine from the xStocks platform enables trading of more than 70 tokenized equities across Ethereum and Solana.

item.title: NEW from @TheGivingBlock’s 2026 Report: Crypto philanthropy hit $100M+ in 2025, a 66% jump YoY; and Ripple is proud to be part of it. ➡️ RLUSD: #2 most-donated digital asset ➡️ XRP: #7 overall ➡️ Our work with @DonorsChoose & Teach For America - x.com

item.title: Kazakhstan's Central Bank Will Invest Up to $350 Million in Crypto Assets: Reuters
item.description: The planned investments represent a sliver of its gold and foreign exchange reserves.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin has hit its most oversold level in 11 years, according to the Ultimate Oscillator 🤯 This is bullish! 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1vTU9EcVIyRUVKUl9BS296ZkhQNWVCS25lcUJzZnlLTldfWWVyMHd0NHptTkYzbnlwWmtYVEtDN2twVXNIZXVIdkhYTlBnU1Y1MWo0RHBPamVjN1lrdEkxbmwteVJwb00?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin has hit it…

item.title: Nigel Farage Confidant Linked to $550K Loss On Iran Strike Polymarket Bet: Report
item.description: A Polymarket account bearing George Cottrell’s name made multiple geopolitical bets, amid growing scrutiny over prediction markets.

item.title: ⚡ INSIGHT: Bitcoin is in a "bear market year" but October could mark a key turning point, says Benjamin Cowen. Feat. @intocryptoverse via Cointelegraph Magazine - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5VdGRWZ1lrOC10Tk1fdGp3MURGdEpTQzRqRE9mMldndUVzUXRBSHlwSDlueGlfWTQwQnFCTkVhMUJGS3pUVmwwdy11NDU2dlh4aG1tWUlxVTJtSE9yMkZoX3pmY2E?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡ INSIGHT: Bitcoin is in a "bea…

item.title: Dubai Orders Crypto Exchange KuCoin to Stop Offering Services to Residents
item.description: KuCoin must stop offering its services in Dubai, the emirate's crypto regulator said this week, as it is not appropriately licensed.

item.title: Bitcoin buyers are cashing out fast after short-lived jump to $74,000
item.description: The sharp move higher triggered heavy profit-taking from short-term holders, data shows.

item.title: Bitcoin Dives Below $69K as US Loses 92K Jobs in February
item.description: Bitcoin has fallen 5% in the last day as the U.S. shed 92,000 jobs in February, rattling crypto markets amid growing economic uncertainty.

item.title: Binance tells Senate probe no accounts sent crypto directly to Iran
item.description: Crypto exchange pushed back on $1.7 billion Iran-linked flow allegations and called media reports behind the probe “defamatory.”

item.title: 'No deal with Iran': Trump demands unconditional surrender, sending oil surging, bitcoin and stocks lower
item.description: The outlook for the Fed grew cloudier on Friday, as the employment market weakened appreciably even as inflation could be worsening.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aave drops 4.3% as all index constituents trade lower
item.description: Solana (SOL), down 3.1% since Thursday, joined Aave (AAVE) as an underperformer.

item.title: #Bitcoin Pullback BTC is back inside the range. As long as price holds within the FVG, a move toward the upper range remains possible. If the FVG fails, the next key support sits at the lower FVG around $66.5k. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE8tMFVrNnlGbkM1MGxBQUNZakNVSlE1TzR0QmJwNmJZQWI2dFFWa210dFN5OWhhc09GbFRnOWVtcUZsRXMzZDFweGxsRGVzZlF1ZDlDR0loc1hMc2F2R1JvanNn?oc=5" target="_blank">#Bitcoin Pullback BTC is back insi…

item.title: U.S. unexpectedly lost 92,000 jobs in February, unemployment rate rose to 4.4%
item.description: Bitcoin remained under pressure even as the data likely puts back in play the chances of Fed rate cuts in the first half of 2026.

item.title: Morning Minute: The NYSE Just Bought Into A Major Crypto Exchange
item.description: The institutions continue to pile into crypto and blockchain projects, and end users stand to benefit.

item.title: Kazakhstan central bank to invest $350 million worth of gold, forex reserves into digital assets
item.description: The central bank plans to invest in crypto infrastructure firms, tech stocks and funds tied to digital assets.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Shed $228M, But Longer-Term Flows Stabilize
item.description: Bitcoin ETFs saw their worst outflows in three weeks, with experts highlighting early re-accumulation as flows stabilize.

item.title: Bitcoin hit by short-termism as rally fades ahead of U.S. jobs data
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 6, 2026

item.title: Strike secures New York BitLicense, opening bitcoin financial services to state residents
item.description: NYDFS approval allows the Bitcoin payments company to offer trading, bill pay and custody products across New York.

item.title: Bitcoin extends decline from $74,000, derivatives data point to cautious positioning
item.description: BTC traded just above $70,000 as Middle East tensions drove oil higher and traders reassessed inflation in advance of the U.S. jobs report due later Friday.
